summary: Excellent matrix recording with superb soundstage captures a fireworks‑lit July 4 1981 show where the second set’s Bird Song, Wharf Rat and China Cat→I Know You Rider jams shine.
review: The tape delivers crystal‑clear depth and balance – a well‑mixed soundboard/audience composite that many reviewers call “superb” and superior to pure audience versions. Musically the concert is highlighted by a soaring second set (Bird Song, Wharf Rat, China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider, Space→Not Fade Away) despite a brief interruption from fireworks; a few listeners note a shaky vocal moment and a short second set, but overall the performance is regarded as one of the stronger Independence Day shows.

ai_rating.rationale: Over 80 % of reviews are 4‑5 stars and praise both the audio fidelity and key musical moments; only a few low‑star comments focus on set length or isolated performance slips, yielding an overall weighted rating around 4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, balanced mix with strong midrange and depth; reviewers note superb soundboard clarity combined with audience ambience, occasional minor quirks but no major drop‑outs.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider
poor_songs: Jack Straw (mixed feeling after fireworks interruption)
show_quality.setlist_flow: Two energetic sets bookended by a blazing Jack Straw opener and a fireworks‑cut short second set; transitions such as Space→Not Fade Away and China Cat→I Know You Rider are highlighted, while the brief pause from fireworks gave the show an unusual pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for “perfect tone” and tight interplay with Brent; a few notes of vocal shakiness early in the set.
band_member_comments.Bob: Vocals described as sharp and strong, especially on first‑set numbers; however Bob’s delivery on One More Saturday Night is called out as slipping.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keys) receives high marks for interplay with Jerry and contributes to the recording’s depth and balance.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drumming noted as tight, particularly during the Not Fade Away groove.
